title: Brigade Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Brigade Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!
